html:
2026-0207
2026-03-06PMOCanada Elections ActBy-Election - TerrebonneOrder directing that a WRIT OF ELECTION do issue in order to fill the vacancy in the House of Commons for the electoral district of Terrebonne, in Quebec, with polling to take place on April 13, 2026.N/A
subject: By-Election - Terrebonne
precis: Order directing that a WRIT OF ELECTION do issue in order to fill the vacancy in the House of Commons for the electoral district of Terrebonne, in Quebec, with polling to take place on April 13, 2026.
